response:
### Programming Haiku (follows traditional 5-7-5 syllable structure)
Screen glows, half past two (5)  
Off-by-one haunts my tight loop (7)  
All counts now align (5)

The haiku captures a universal developer experience: pulling a late coding session, grappling with the ubiquitous off-by-one loop bug, and the quiet satisfaction of finally squashing the issue to get clean, accurate results.
